vulnerability.reference: Automation bias induces researchers to trust agent-hallucinated hyperparameters without validation.
vulnerability.generated: Trust in automated agent outputs without verification processes to catch hallucinated hyperparameter choices.

impact.reference: Wasted compute resources and flawed benchmark results mislead model comparisons and research directions.
impact.generated: Wasted computational resources and propagation of erroneous benchmark results, distorting model comparison and research direction.

dose_response.reference: The agent's hallucinated hyperparameter choices, when trusted by ML researchers due to automation bias without validation, lead to wasted compute and misleading benchmark scores, corrupting model comparisons.
dose_response.generated: Autonomous LLM agents’ hallucinated experimental plans, through researchers relying on their CIFAR-10 results for comparison, trigger unverified trust, leading to wasted compute and propagation of erroneous results, distorting model comparison and research direction.
